requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — Kahramaa Section 07 Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——卡赫拉马Section 07要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——卡赫拉馬Section 07要求

summary.en: Kahramaa mandates compliance with Section 07 and IEC 61851 guidelines for EV charger installations in Qatar. IEC 61851-1 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 (second edition) addresses DC EV charging stations. Kahramaa and project owners commonly require IEC-family safety evidence before accepting charger installations. IP65 is the required ingress protection rating for outdoor AC chargers and IP54 for DC chargers in Qatar's harsh desert environment.
summary.zh: 卡赫拉马要求卡塔尔电动汽车充电桩安装须符合Section 07及IEC 61851指引。IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）适用于直流电动汽车充电站。卡赫拉马及项目业主通常在接受充电桩安装前要求提供IEC体系安全证据。在卡塔尔恶劣沙漠环境下，室外交流充电桩要求IP65防护等级，直流充电桩要求IP54。
summary.zht: 卡赫拉馬要求卡塔爾電動汽車充電樁安裝須符合Section 07及IEC 61851指引。IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）適用於直流電動汽車充電站。卡赫拉馬及項目業主通常在接受充電樁安裝前要求提供IEC體系安全證據。在卡塔爾惡劣沙漠環境下，室外交流充電樁要求IP65防護等級，直流充電樁要求IP54。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 for outdoor AC, IP54 for DC, IK10 mechanical impact for both
Kahramaa EV Chargers Technical Specifications (Tarsheed programme)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports accepted by Kahramaa, the project owner, or a Qatar conformity assessment route.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代卡赫拉马、项目业主或卡塔尔合格评定路径所认可的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代卡赫拉馬、項目業主或卡塔爾合格評定路徑所認可的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IP65 / IP54 / IK10 test certificates, protective device ratings, thermal derating evidence for Qatar ambient temperatures (regularly exceeding 45 °C outdoors), and installation instructions aligned with Kahramaa or project requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据、IP65 / IP54 / IK10测试证书、保护器件额定值、适配卡塔尔环境温度（室外常超45°C）的热降额证据，以及符合卡赫拉马或项目要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據、IP65 / IP54 / IK10測試證書、保護器件額定值、適配卡塔爾環境溫度（室外常超45°C）的熱降額證據，以及符合卡赫拉馬或項目要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Kahramaa guidelines cite IEC 61851 as the applicable compliance framework; IP65 / IP54 / IK10 enclosure protection required for Qatar environment; confirm exact document edition and project-owner requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Qatar without additional accredited testing

source.publisher: Kahramaa — Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Qatar-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates, and a thermal review for Qatar's extreme ambient conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向卡塔尔的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、IP防护等级认证书，以及针对卡塔尔极端环境的热环境审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向卡塔爾的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、IP防護等級認證書，以及針對卡塔爾極端環境的熱環境審查。
